description: DB-backed: WIP math — billable uninvoiced time + unbilled material for client sums correctly; invoiced/non-billable excluded; wip_aging flag only when entries >14d
DB-backed: unassigned flag — open unassigned ticket produces flag; assigned/closed do not; assignee name present on topOpen rows
DB-backed: warranty counts — units with expired / ≤90d / no warranty dates bucket correctly; summary null when client has no warranty data
DB-backed or unit per W1 outcome: SLA flag emitted only from real computable targets
DB-backed: timeline draft-invoice suppression — draft invoice emits no invoice_created event; finalized invoice emits created+finalized as before
Browser smoke: Emerald City shows WIP line, assignees, warranty line (after seeding), CSAT collapsed; no duplicated draft noise in timeline
